title: View Sounds
description: A client-side mod that visualizes sounds with colored squares when crouching for a configurable time
body:
The mod adds the ability to see the sources of sounds around you - hostile mobs, friendly mobs, players, blocks, and so on.  
~~At the moment, it only works with sounds that come from an entity.~~  
Now works with all sound sources!  
Flexible configuration of colors, radius for sounds, and visibility switching for each type of sound source.  
Feel free to write your suggestions and bug reports.
